name: microgrid
description: an islanded-microgrid management world; actions island, reconnect, balance

card.description: an islanded-microgrid management world; actions island, reconnect, balance

rules: While grid_connected, the main grid sources or sinks any imbalance and the bus frequency holds at 60.0 Hz.
While islanded, generation must equal load instantaneously; any surplus or deficit drives frequency_hz off 60 Hz (rising on surplus, drooping on deficit).
A deficit while islanded sheds load and accumulates in unserved_kwh; the grid never feeds an islanded bus.
balance dispatches the battery to close the gen/load gap, bounded by the 50 kW power limit and by battery_soc staying within 0-100%.
island opens the point-of-common-coupling breaker and zeroes grid_import_kw; reconnect closes it and re-stiffens the bus to 60 Hz.
Solar and load follow fixed diurnal profiles of the step count, so dynamics are deterministic and replayable.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action

    cap = float(s.get("battery_capacity_kwh", 200.0))  # usable battery energy (kWh)
    max_batt = 50.0                                     # battery power limit (kW)
    dt = 1.0                                            # hours advanced per step

    # --- advance the environment along deterministic diurnal profiles ---
    step = int(s.get("step", 0)) + 1
    s["step"] = step
    phase = step % 24
    daylight = math.sin(math.pi * phase / 24.0)
    s["solar_kw"] = round(50.0 * (daylight if daylight > 0 else 0.0), 3)
    s["load_kw"] = round(35.0 + 12.0 * math.sin(math.pi * (phase - 8) / 12.0), 3)

    solar = s["solar_kw"]
    load = s["load_kw"]
    soc = float(s.get("battery_soc", 50.0))            # percent, 0..100

    # battery power delivered to the bus: + = discharge (support), - = charge (absorb)
    batt = 0.0

    if name == "island":
        s["grid_connected"] = False
        s["grid_import_kw"] = 0.0
    elif name == "reconnect":
        s["grid_connected"] = True
    elif name == "balance":
        gap = load - solar                              # + deficit, - surplus
        desired = max(-max_batt, min(max_batt, gap))
        avail_kwh = soc / 100.0 * cap                   # energy available to discharge
        head_kwh = (100.0 - soc) / 100.0 * cap          # room left to charge
        if desired > 0:                                 # discharge, capped by stored energy
            desired = min(desired, avail_kwh / dt)
        else:                                           # charge, capped by headroom
            desired = max(desired, -head_kwh / dt)
        batt = round(desired, 3)

    connected = bool(s.get("grid_connected", True))

    # --- battery state-of-charge update ---
    delivered_kwh = batt * dt                           # >0 removes stored energy
    soc = soc - 100.0 * delivered_kwh / cap
    soc = max(0.0, min(100.0, soc))
    s["battery_soc"] = round(soc, 3)
    s["battery_kw"] = batt

    # --- power balance on the bus ---
    bus_net = solar + batt - load                       # + surplus, - deficit
    if connected:
        # the main grid sources/sinks the imbalance and holds the bus at nominal
        s["grid_import_kw"] = round(-bus_net, 3)        # + import (deficit), - export (surplus)
        s["frequency_hz"] = 60.0
        s["mode"] = "grid-tied"
    else:
        # islanded: nothing else absorbs the imbalance, so frequency drifts
        s["grid_import_kw"] = 0.0
        s["frequency_hz"] = round(60.0 + 0.15 * bus_net, 3)
        s["mode"] = "islanded"
        if bus_net < 0:                                 # unmet demand is shed
            s["unserved_kwh"] = round(float(s.get("unserved_kwh", 0.0)) - bus_net * dt, 3)

    return s

emit.report: Microgrid [{mode}] @ {frequency_hz} Hz | PV {solar_kw} kW, load {load_kw} kW | battery {battery_soc}% ({battery_kw} kW) | grid {grid_import_kw} kW | unserved {unserved_kwh} kWh

objectives.name: frequency_stability
objectives.goal: keep frequency_hz as close to 60 Hz as possible

objectives.name: reserve
objectives.goal: keep battery_soc within a safe 20-90% band
